name: Cajun Catfish Remoulade
recipeIngredient: 1 Head of Lettuce; torn into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first seven ingredients in a glass jar. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
2. Cut the catfish fillets into bite-sized pieces.
3. In a large pot, bring water, Old Bay Seasoning, bay leaves, and cayenne pepper to a gentle simmer.
4. Add the catfish fillets and cook until the meat flakes, about 10 minutes.
5. Remove from heat, cover, and let the fish cool in the cooking liquid.
6. Refrigerate until serving time.
7. To serve, drain the catfish fillets and place them on a lettuce-lined platter.
8. Place the remoulade sauce in a bowl and nestle it in the center of the serving platter.
9. Garnish with tomato wedges and parsley.
